home.heroSubtitle: Ship your pump.fun-style token launcher in minutes. Every token pairs with $HOODIE; graduated tokens move to Uniswap.
home.hoodieDesc: Every token on HOODIEPAD trades against $HOODIE and graduates into a TOKEN/HOODIE pool. This is the fuel of the whole platform.
home.how1Desc: Pick your slug, set your theme, write your launcher on-chain.
home.how2Desc: Let your community create tokens and trade them on the bonding curve.
home.how3Desc: Tokens reaching an 85M HOODIE reserve move to Uniswap; LP is burned.

create.title: Create Launcher
create.slugHint: 3-32 chars, lowercase letters, digits and dashes only.
create.logoHint: Upload PNG/JPG — it gets auto-pixelated. Pinned to IPFS via the API.
create.featAntiSniperDesc: Limit bot buys in the first blocks
create.featSocialDesc: X / Telegram / web links on token pages
create.feeHint: Your cut of every trade: {bps} bps ({pct}%)
create.successBody: Your 8-bit dream is live. The launcher is on air.
create.demoNote: Contract address not configured — no transaction is sent in demo mode.

docs.title: Docs
docs.launcherBody: HOODIEPAD is a launchpad factory: you build your own pump.fun-style token launcher without writing code. In the wizard you pick a name and slug, set a logo and theme, toggle features, and choose your own launcher fee between 0-100 bps. In the final step you approve the 50,000 HOODIE creation fee and sign the createLauncher transaction. Your launcher goes live instantly at hoodiepad.xyz/slug.
docs.curveBody: Every new token is born on a constant-product (x*y=k) bonding curve with virtual reserves: it starts with 300M virtual HOODIE and 1.073B virtual tokens. The sale supply is 793.1M tokens. Buys push the price up deterministically, sells push it down; liquidity is locked in the curve so it cannot be rugged. A 1% fee is taken from the HOODIE side of every trade.
docs.graduationBody: When the curve's real HOODIE reserve reaches the 85M HOODIE threshold, the token graduates: a 2% graduation fee is deducted, the remaining HOODIE and tokens are added to a Uniswap pool, and the LP tokens are burned. Anyone can call graduate() to trigger it and earn a 0.05% incentive. After graduation, trading continues on Uniswap.
docs.faq1q: How do I collect my launcher fees?
docs.faq1a: The 'Claim' button in the admin panel withdraws your accumulated HOODIE fees from the FeeSplitter contract to your wallet.
docs.faq2q: What if my token never graduates?
docs.faq2a: It simply keeps trading on the bonding curve indefinitely. Liquidity is locked in the curve; nobody can withdraw it.
docs.faq3a: It enforces a per-wallet buy limit during a token's first blocks, making it harder for bots to grab most of the supply.
docs.faq4q: Can I change my slug later?
docs.faq4a: No. The slug is part of the launcher's on-chain identity. Theme, logo and features can be updated at any time.
docs.riskBody: Crypto assets are extremely volatile and you can lose all of your capital. Tokens on HOODIEPAD are created by community members; none of them are endorsed or audited by HOODIEPAD. Smart contracts carry bug risk even when audited. Nothing on this site is investment advice. Never deposit money you cannot afford to lose.
